summary: Completed comprehensive code structure validation for missiAI refactoring. All required files exist with correct exports, proper implementation patterns, and TypeScript compilation passes for new/modified files.
passed_tests: lib/fetch-with-timeout.ts exists with correct exports (fetchWithTimeout, CHAT_TIMEOUT=10000, TTS_TIMEOUT=15000, STT_TIMEOUT=10000)
fetchWithTimeout uses AbortController internally and merges caller's signal
fetchWithTimeout throws Error('Request timed out') on timeout
checkVoiceSupport checks navigator.mediaDevices, getUserMedia, and MIME types in priority order
hooks/useVoiceStateMachine.ts exists and exports useVoiceStateMachine hook with VoiceState type
useVoiceStateMachine exposes all required functions (state, startRecording, stopRecording, cancelAll, audioLevel, statusText, lastTranscript, error, handleTap, greet, saveMemoryBeacon)
useVoiceStateMachine uses single abortControllerRef and isTransitioning ref
useVoiceStateMachine uses fetchWithTimeout for /api/tts, /api/stt, /api/chat with correct timeouts
useVoiceStateMachine uses getBestAudioMimeType() when initializing MediaRecorder
All async operations in useVoiceStateMachine have try/catch/finally with reset to idle on error
app/chat/page.tsx uses useVoiceStateMachine hook instead of inline voice logic
sendBeacon memory save checks payload size < 60000 and truncates to last 6 messages if over
Both beforeunload and visibilitychange event listeners are set up for memory save
TypeScript compilation passes for all new/modified files
Next.js build compiles successfully (errors are pre-existing in sign-up/waitlist pages as expected)
